zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Bardwell於大約1431年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其時，她的父親Sir William Berdewell20歲，母親Elizabeth Hethe17歲。她於1452年與John Harleston在英國英格蘭素福爾可肯特維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年11月6日在英國英格蘭素福爾可素德波利享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Bardwell于大约1431年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其时，她的父亲Sir William Berdewell20岁，母亲Elizabeth Hethe17岁。她于1452年与John Harleston在英国英格兰素福爾可肯特維爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年11月6日在英国英格兰素福爾可素德波利享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bardwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from Bardwell in Suffolk, so named with an unattested Old English byname Bearda, a derivative of beard (see Beard ) + Old English well(a) ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, the first element may be from a dissimilated form of Old English bre(o)rd ‘brim, bank’.

variants.name: Beard
meanings: nickname for a bearded man (from Middle English berd, Old English beard). To be clean-shaven was the norm in non-Jewish communities in northwestern Europe from the 12th to the 16th century, the crucial period for surname formation. There is a placename and other evidence to show that this word was used as a byname in the Old English period, when beards were the norm; in this period the byname would have referred to a large or noticeable beard. In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates and equivalents in other languages, in particular German Barth 1.

habitational name from a place called Beard in Derbyshire (now represented by Beard Hall and Beardwood Farms in New Mills parish), which derives its name by dissimilation from Old English brerd ‘rim, bank’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Bardwell was born about 1431, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Berdewell, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth Hethe, was 17. She married John Harleston in 1452, in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 6 November 1459, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Bardwell est née environ 1431, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Berdewell, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hethe, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John Harleston en 1452, à Kentwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 novembre 1459, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Bardwell um 1431 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Berdewell 20 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hethe 17. Sie hat 1452 in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom John Harleston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. November 1459 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bardwell è nata il circa 1431 nel Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Berdewell, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Hethe, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John Harleston nel 1452, nel Kentwell, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1459, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Bardwellが約1431年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父Sir William Berdewellは20歳，母Elizabeth Hetheは17歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリススフォルクケントウエルでJohn Harlestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1459年11月6日にイギリスイギリススフォルクスドブリーで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Bardwell(이)가 대략 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Berdewell(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hethe(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 켄트웰에서 John Harleston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 11월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수드버이에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bardwell nasceu aproximadamente 1431, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Berdewell, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hethe, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John Harleston em 1452, em Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1459, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Bardwell родилась около 1431 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Berdewell было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hethe, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Harleston в 1452 г. в местности кэнтвелл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 ноября 1459 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Bardwell nació aproximadamente 1431, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Berdewell, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hethe, tenía 17 años. Se casó con John Harleston en 1452, en Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1459, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años.
